## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss organizational structure and roles for GrowthX's services division.](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Org chart revealed: CCO (Matthew) → Directors → MEs, with focus on scaling client ops](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [New directors onboarding: Bronco introduced, 1:1s ongoing with Matthew](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Client acquisition momentum: Marcel hinted at potential new customer post-meeting](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Competitive landscape heating up: Marcel fielding inquiries from AI company leaders](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Topics

### Organizational Structure

  - [Matthew Panzarino as Chief Content Officer (CCO)](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Directors layer: Bronco, Dave, Mara, Jacob, Stuart](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Client Ops scaling: Jason to join director level as client base grows](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [ME (Managed Expert) layer under each director](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
      - [Bronco: Jessica + TBH](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
      - [Dave: Jen, Mariana](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
      - [Mara: Vivek](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
      - [Jacob: David](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Ops and Engineering divisions exist but weren't focus of this meeting](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)

### Director Onboarding

  - [Matthew conducting 1:1s with new directors (Stuart, Jacob completed)](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Bronco introduced; 1:1 with Matthew pending](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Goal: Ensure clear understanding of org chart, roles, and responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)

### Business Development

  - [Marcel hinted at potential new customer, meeting scheduled post-call](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Considering creation of "GrowthX" as a client record in their system](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
      - [Jason assigned as director for this account](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
      - [Humorous note on importance of retaining their own product as a client](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Marcel fielding inquiries from AI company leaders (Copy.ai CTO, Jasper CEO, Anthropic CEO)](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Questions revolve around monetization strategies in the AI space](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)

### Technical Difficulties

  - [Org chart viewing issues in Figma-like tool](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Kyle took screenshot, shared in directors' chat as workaround](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Complete 1:1 onboarding sessions with remaining directors (esp. Bronco)](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Finalize and distribute clear org chart to all team members](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Create GrowthX client record in internal system (Jason to lead)](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Follow up on potential new customer from Marcel's post-meeting call](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Address technical issues with org chart viewing tool for future meetings](https://fathom.video/share/FRY5ApPjxGVDN83Rd3G8Dgoep2LGPScz?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
